meta.title: DirtBikeX — Dirt bike community for iPhone
meta.description: DirtBikeX is a global dirt bike community with a native iOS app — share rides, swap builds, talk trails, and learn from riders who love dirt bikes as much as you do.
hero.subtitle: A modern native space to share rides, swap builds, talk trails, and learn from people who love dirt bikes as much as you do.
hero.stat.languagesPopFoot: Marketing site: English, 简体中文, 繁體中文, 日本語. More coming.
features.title: Built for the dirt bike community
features.subtitle: A dedicated app for riders, fans, builders, beginners, and experienced off-road enthusiasts.
features.f1.title: Talk about everything dirt
features.f1.body: Every dirt topic in one focused place — and every post auto-translates across 21 languages. Talk shop with riders worldwide, no language barrier. Jump in.
features.f2.title: Native iPhone experience
features.f2.body: 90%+ hand-built native SwiftUI, around 50 MB installed — fast, light, barely a dent in your storage. Feel it the moment you open the app.
features.f3.title: Share rides, learn together
features.f3.body: Post your route, a shot from the top, a clip of the gnarly bit. Ask anything — riders who've ridden it answer. Share your next ride.
features.f4.title: For every kind of rider
features.f4.body: New rider or seasoned racer, weekend cruiser or full-time wrench — everyone here rides something. Find your people and start a thread.
featured.title: What riders are talking about right now
featured.subtitle: Top monthly threads from across the forum — what regulars said was worth reading this month.
featured.cta: Browse all threads on the forum
faq.title: Common questions
faq.q1.a: Riders, fans, builders, beginners, and experienced off-road enthusiasts. If dirt bikes are part of your life, you’ll fit in.
faq.q2.a: Bikes, riding techniques, trails, gear, maintenance, events, builds, safety, racing, off-road culture — and anything in between.
faq.q3.q: Is there a web forum too?
faq.q3.a: Yes. The community is also accessible at forum.dirtbikex.com if you prefer browsing on a larger screen.
faq.q4.a: Free to download, free to read, free to post. We may add optional supporter perks later — never paywall the conversation.
faq.cta.title: Still curious?
faq.cta.sub: Drop into the forum and ask
founders.title: Founders
founders.calvin.name: Zenkai Rubio
founders.calvin.bio: Rider by day, coder by night — building DirtBikeX from the saddle and the keyboard.
founders.rebecca.name: Rebecca
founders.cici.name: Cici
founders.secret.name: Secret person
sponsorship.title: Put your brand on the mountain
sponsorship.body: The hero image at the top of DirtBikeX is the app's single most-seen surface. We reserve it for brand partners — about a month of premium placement, arranged directly, in exchange for cross-promotion. Not an in-app purchase; a partnership.
sponsorship.offer.title: How hero placement works
sponsorship.offer.body: One brand at a time holds the hero slot. You promote DirtBikeX to your audience — your site, storefront, or socials — and we feature your brand on the mountain for about a month, then share a report on the exposure it earned.
sponsorship.give.title: You provide
sponsorship.give.1: Promote DirtBikeX to your audience (site, store, or socials)
sponsorship.give.2: A co-branded image for the hero placement
sponsorship.give.3: A link riders can follow back to you
sponsorship.get.title: You receive
sponsorship.get.1: ~1 month on the app's most-seen surface
sponsorship.get.3: A place in the DirtBikeX community
sponsorship.how.title: How it works
sponsorship.how.1.title: Reach out
sponsorship.how.1.body: Tell us about your brand and what you'd cross-promote.
sponsorship.how.2.title: Scope the deal
sponsorship.how.2.body: We agree the month, the assets, and the cross-promotion.
sponsorship.how.3.title: Go live
sponsorship.how.3.body: Your brand takes the mountain; we share the exposure report.
sponsorship.fit.note: Looking for the self-serve avatar spot instead? That's an in-app purchase — grab one from the Sponsorships tab in the app.
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: The forum is the fastest place for community questions. For everything else, email works best.
contact.forum.title: Best place: the forum
contact.forum.body: Questions about the app, the community, or your account usually get the fastest, most useful answer from other riders on the forum.
contact.email.title: Email us
contact.email.intro: For anything that doesn't fit in the forum — privacy, legal, copyright (DMCA), press, sponsorships, account security — send us an email.
contact.dm.title: Direct message
contact.social.title: Follow along
contact.social.subtitle: Social channels (links go live as we launch them).
contact.mail.title: Postal mail
contact.mail.note: For legal service of process, please use the email address above first; physical mail will be received by our registered agent.
footer.tagline: Ride together. Share freely. Build the global dirt bike community.
legal.noticeOnlyEn: This document is provided in English only. The English version is the authoritative version of these terms.
legal.noticeFallback: {locale} translation is not yet available. The English version below is the authoritative version of these terms.
notfound.title: Page not found
notfound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
join.meta.title: Join DirtBikeX — perks & product drops
join.meta.description: DirtBikeX is live on the App Store. Join the list for early-supporter perks, first looks at new features, and ride-day drops. Double opt-in, unsubscribe anytime.
join.eyebrow: iOS app · Live on the App Store
join.subtitle: DirtBikeX is live. Join the list for early-supporter perks, first looks at new features, and the occasional ride-day drop — no noise, just the good stuff.
join.finePrint: Already free — to download, to read, to post. The list is just perks and the occasional drop.
join.consent: By joining you agree to receive perk & product updates from DirtBikeX. Unsubscribe anytime.
join.sent.title: Check your inbox
join.sent.body: We just sent a confirmation link. Tap it to lock in your perks — check spam if it’s not there in a minute.
join.confirmed.title: You’re in.
join.confirmed.body: Confirmed — early-supporter perks and the occasional drop are headed your way. Meanwhile, the app’s live on the App Store.
join.expired.title: Link expired
join.expired.body: That confirmation link is no longer valid. Enter your email again to get a fresh one.
join.unsubscribed.title: You’re unsubscribed
join.unsubscribed.body: You won’t receive emails from the DirtBikeX list. Changed your mind? You can sign up again anytime.
join.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
join.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
join.invite.subtitle: Drop your email and we'll send your invite link and QR code straight to your inbox.
join.invite.sent.title: Check your inbox
join.invite.sent.body: Your invite link and QR code are on the way. Confirm the email to lock it in — check spam if it's not there in a minute.
join.code.invalid.title: This invite link isn't valid
join.code.invalid.body: It may have already been used or expired. Ask for a fresh link.
